headline: Trump Just Made An Obscure Pentagon Office Bigger Than The Marine Corps. Here Are 5 Stocks For This $1.5 Trillion Defense Opportunity
summary: Buried inside President Trump’s Fiscal Year 2027 defense budget request sits a line item that dwarfs almost every other increase in the document. The Defense Autonomous Warfare Group (DAWG), a Pentagon office that stood up quietly late last year with an initial budget of roughly $225 to $226 million, is slated to receive $54.6 billion ... Trump Just Made An Obscure Pentagon Office Bigger Than The Marine Corps. Here Are 5 Stocks For This $1.5 Trillion Defense Opportunity

headline: The U.S. Army Just Took a Historic Step to Break China's Rare Earth Dominance
summary: The U.S. Army's decision to establish commercial heavy rare earth processing at a military installation marks a major milestone in America's effort to rebuild a domestic critical minerals supply chain and reduce reliance on China.
